query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A monochrome close-up photograph of a translucent sphere resting on a flat, light-toned surface. The sphere is lit from above and behind, appearing as a dark silhouette with a small bright highlight on its upper surface. It casts an elongated shadow with a bright circular center caused by light passing through the sphere. The subject is positioned in the upper right area of the frame against a gradient background that lightens toward the center and darkens toward the corners.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monochrome close-up photograph showing a translucent sphere resting on a flat, light-toned surface, rendered with heavy analog film grain throughout. The sphere is lit from above and behind, appearing as a dark silhouette with a small bright highlight on its upper surface, and casts an elongated shadow with a bright circular center caused by light passing through the sphere. Pervasive coarse grain blankets the entire frame, adding organic texture, tactile imperfection, and an archival quality to the high-contrast composition.
